APPLICATION AND DECLARATION FOR ORDER (DOMESTIC VIOLENCE) FILED BY PERSON TO BE PROTECTED MARCHETTI, DAVID AS TO PERSON TO BE RESTRAINED STAUB, ELIZABETH A
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE TEMPORARY JUDGE- NORDIN BLACKER, ESQ.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE AND TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER (CLETS) FILED BY PERSON TO BE PROTECTED MARCHETTI, DAVID AS TO PERSON TO BE RESTRAINED STAUB, ELIZABETH A HEARING SET FOR SEP-11-2002 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 404

N/A BY PETITIONER. RESPONDENT IN PRO PER. PRESENT ISSUE BEFORE THE COURT IS RESPONDENT'S REQUEST TO MODIFY THE THREE-YEAR R/O ISSUED AGAINST HER (RESPONDENT) ON SEPTEMBER 11, 2002. A CRIMINAL R/O HEARING, PREVIOUSLY SET FOR SEPTEMBER 18, 2002, WAS CONTINUED TO OCTOBER 25, 2002. COURT WILL DROP TODAY'S MATTER PENDING RESOLUTION OF THE CRIMINAL ACTION. IF RESPONDENT SO CHOOSES, SHE MAY BRING A NOTICED MOTION TO MODIFY THE CIVIL R/O BEFORE THIS COURT AFTER THE OCTOBER 25TH CRIMINAL HEARING. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY MARY ELLEN SCHERER, CSR #5208.
